email_templates.subject: ⏰ Time for your car's seasonal detail?
email_templates.content:
Hi [NAME],

With the changing season, your car faces new challenges:

🍂 Fall: Leaves, sap, and prep for winter
❄️ Winter: Salt protection and interior care
🌸 Spring: Pollen removal and fresh start
☀️ Summer: UV protection and heat damage prevention

Our seasonal detail packages include:
• Thorough exterior wash & wax
• Interior deep clean & protection
• Seasonal-specific treatments
• FREE maintenance tips

Seasonal Special: $119 (reg $149)
Mobile service - we come to you!

Book today: [WEBSITE]
Questions? Call [PHONE]

Keep your car looking its best!
[BUSINESS_NAME]
